title: Dr. Caro urban bus interchange in Elche / ARN / Arquitectos
summary: This is a new urban space conceived as a place for exchange. A climate refuge where shade, vegetation, and various modes of being create a new city landscape that opens up to the slope of the nearby Vinalopó River.
